title: Button
description: Clickable action control. This is a contract/spec, not a mandatory implementation.

props.name: loading
props.description: Shows busy state; should prevent repeated submission.

states.name: hover
effects: Slight background change and/or elevation change within motion rules.

states.name: active
effects: Provide tactile feedback (e.g. slight translate or darker bg).

states.name: focus-visible
effects: Show focus ring using semantic border focus token.

states.name: disabled
effects: Reduce contrast, disable pointer events, preserve readable label.

states.name: loading
effects: Show spinner, set aria-busy, prevent double activation.

keyboard: Use <button> whenever possible to get keyboard and semantics for free.
aria: If loading is true, set aria-busy="true" on the button or nearest relevant container.
If disabled is true, use the disabled attribute on <button> (not only aria-disabled).

must: Keep a visible focus indicator (do not remove outline without replacement).
Ensure minimum hit area (~40px height or equivalent padding).
should: Prefer semantic tokens for colors and borders.
When loading, keep label readable or provide accessible name.
must_not: Do not rely on color alone to indicate the variant (use shape/label/icon where needed).

token_usage.notes: Used for primary variant; other variants map to bg.surface/muted/danger.
Baseline padding for md size; sm/lg can scale from primitives.space.
